mentions.note: Real lender with $18.8B loans and solid brand relationships but lumpy credit-sensitive earnings (swings from $15.95 to $4.47 to $14.74 to $7.60 to $12.16 per share). Customer base skews sub-720 credit scores with 5.8% delinquency; cheap at <8x 2026E but cheap subprime always cheapest before credit cracks. Capital One (COF) and Affirm offer cleaner alternatives.
